headline: KLA’s AI-Focused Results And Larger Buyback Might Change The Case For Investing In KLA (KLAC)
summary: KLA recently reported Q3 FY26 revenue of US$3.42 billion, including US$3.08 billion from its Semi Process Control segment, alongside its 17th consecutive dividend increase and a new US$7.00 billion share buyback authorization, even as sector-wide semiconductor stocks came under pressure following SK hynix-led profit taking in AI and memory names. These developments highlight how KLA’s role as an AI-enabling process control supplier and its willingness to return substantial capital to...
